mapper.insert: insert into t_user_role_rel (user_id, role_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BOOLEAN})
mapper.select: select role_id from t_user_role_rel where user_id = #{userId} and deleted = false
